evals.prompt: I have 3 HubSpot deals: Dental group 3K/mo in Proposal Sent 3 weeks, last contact 10 days ago, only office manager. HVAC 2K/mo Discovery, talked twice, no next step. Real estate 5K/mo Negotiation, 2 contacts, meeting next week. Which need attention?
evals.expected_output: Apply MEDDPICC to each deal, flag dental as high-risk, HVAC as missing next step, real estate as healthiest, give specific interventions.
expectations: The response applies MEDDPICC to evaluate each deal
The response flags the dental deal as high-risk (single-threaded + stalled in proposal)
The response flags HVAC as missing a committed next step
The response scores real estate as the healthiest deal
The response gives specific intervention actions for each deal

evals.prompt: My win rate this month was 20%. Last month it was 35%. What is going on?
evals.expected_output: Request segmentation data, suggest pipeline velocity analysis, distinguish stage-specific vs across-all-stages drop, propose diagnostic steps.
expectations: The response requests segmentation data before diagnosing
The response suggests pipeline velocity analysis
The response distinguishes a stage-specific drop from an across-the-board drop
The response proposes diagnostic steps rather than assuming a single cause

evals.prompt: I have 45K in weighted pipeline against 15K remaining quota for the month. Am I in good shape?
evals.expected_output: Reject simple 3x coverage, ask about deal health and engagement recency, apply quality-adjusted coverage, output Commit/Best Case/Upside breakdown.
expectations: The response rejects simple 3x weighted coverage as sufficient
The response asks about deal engagement recency and single vs multi-threaded status
The response outputs Commit / Best Case / Upside breakdown
The response applies quality-adjusted coverage rather than raw weighted pipeline
